notes: Tried starting normally, with no esync, no d3d11, and/or wined3d11. Nothing worked.
title: JermaSlots

notes: After clicking on the play button on stream, the game opens in a maximized window. A "Please Read!" screen appears with a face to click on to continue. Clicking the face plays the "byeah" sound and a sound snippet of Jerma saying something about David Bowie. At the same time, the window cuts to black. Nothing else happens.
title: JermaSlots
